memoryArtifacts.headline: House of Ardenne–Luxembourg
memoryArtifacts.description: The House of Luxembourg (or Luxembourg), also known as the House of Ardenne–Luxembourg in order to distinguish it from later families, were a Lotharingian noble family known from the tenth and elevent …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Gisele De Luxembourg Of Luxembourg於大約1009年出生在比利時盧布格時，她的父親Friedrich von Luxemburg Graf im Moselgau45歲，母親Irmintrud von der Wetterau42歲。她於1047年與Raoul "Radulf" De Gand 1st Earl Of Lincoln在比利時利包格阿爾斯特結婚。他們至少是8個兒子的父母。她去世於1059年在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫根特享年51歲，埋葬在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫根特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gisele De Luxembourg Of Luxembourg于大约1009年出生在比利时盧布格时，她的父亲Friedrich von Luxemburg Graf im Moselgau45岁，母亲Irmintrud von der Wetterau42岁。她于1047年与Raoul "Radulf" De Gand 1st Earl Of Lincoln在比利时利包格阿爾斯特结婚。他们至少是8个儿子的父母。她去世于1059年在比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫根特享年51岁，埋葬在比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫根特。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gisele
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: name of Frankish origin, from the Germanic word gisil ‘pledge’. It was a common practice in medieval Europe to leave children as pledges for an alliance, to be brought up at a foreign court, and the name may be derived as a byname from this practice. This was the name by which the wife of Duke Rollo of Normandy ( c.860– c.930 ) was known. On her account the name enjoyed considerable popularity in France from an early period. Use of the name in English-speaking countries is much more recent, and is due mainly to the ballet Giselle (first performed in 1841 ).

variants.name: Gisella
meanings: name of Frankish origin, from the Germanic word gisil ‘pledge’. It was a common practice in medieval Europe to leave children as pledges for an alliance, to be brought up at a foreign court, and the name may be derived as a byname from this practice. This was the name by which the wife of Duke Rollo of Normandy ( c.860– c.930 ) was known. On her account the name enjoyed considerable popularity in France from an early period. Use of the name in English-speaking countries is much more recent, and is due mainly to the ballet Giselle (first performed in 1841 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Gisele De Luxembourg Of Luxembourg was born about 1009, in Luxembourg, Belgium, her father, Friedrich von Luxemburg Graf im Moselgau, was 45 and her mother, Irmintrud von der Wetterau, was 42. She married Raoul "Radulf" De Gand 1st Earl Of Lincoln in 1047, in Aalst, Limburg, Belgium. They were the parents of at least 8 sons. She died in 1059, in Gent, East Flanders, Belgium, at the age of 51, and was buried in Ghent, East Flanders, Belgium.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gisele De Luxembourg Of Luxembourg est née environ 1009, à Luxembourg, Belgique, son père, Friedrich von Luxemburg Graf im Moselgau, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Irmintrud von der Wetterau, avait 42 ans. Elle a épousé Raoul "Radulf" De Gand 1st Earl Of Lincoln en 1047, à Aalst, Limbourg, Belgique. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils. Elle est décédée en 1059, à Gent, Flandre-Orientale, Belgique, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterrée à Gand, Flandre-Orientale, Belgique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gisele De Luxembourg Of Luxembourg um 1009 in Luxemburg, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Friedrich von Luxemburg Graf im Moselgau 45 und ihre Mutter Irmintrud von der Wetterau 42. Sie hat 1047 in Aalst, Limburg, Belgien Raoul "Radulf" De Gand 1st Earl Of Lincoln geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne. Sie starb 1059 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Gent, Ostflandern, Belgien und wurde in Gent, Ostflandern, Belgien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gisele De Luxembourg Of Luxembourg è nata il circa 1009 nel Lussemburgo, Belgio, sua padre, Friedrich von Luxemburg Graf im Moselgau, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Irmintrud von der Wetterau, aveva 42 anni. Lei sposato Raoul "Radulf" De Gand 1st Earl Of Lincoln nel 1047, nel Aalst, Limburgo, Belgio. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli. Morì nel 1059, nel Gent, Fiandra Orientale, Belgio, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolta a Gent, Fiandra Orientale, Belgio.

ja.lifeSummary: Gisele De Luxembourg Of Luxembourgが約1009年にベルギールクセンボウルグで生まれた時，父Friedrich von Luxemburg Graf im Moselgauは45歳，母Irmintrud von der Wetterauは42歳であった。1047年にベルギーリンブルグアールストでRaoul "Radulf" De Gand 1st Earl Of Lincolnと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子の親であった。彼女は1059年にベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンジェントで51歳で死去し，ベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンジェントにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gisele De Luxembourg Of Luxembourg(이)가 대략 1009년 벨기에 루세보우르그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Friedrich von Luxemburg Graf im Moselgau(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Irmintrud von der Wetterau(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 1047년 벨기에 림버그 알스트에서 Raoul "Radulf" De Gand 1st Earl Of Lincoln(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1059년 벨기에 스트-블라아더 젠트에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 벨기에 스트-블라아더 젠트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gisele De Luxembourg Of Luxembourg nasceu aproximadamente 1009, em Luxemburgo, Bélgica, seu pai, Friedrich von Luxemburg Graf im Moselgau, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Irmintrud von der Wetterau, tinha 42 anos. Ela casou-se com Raoul "Radulf" De Gand 1st Earl Of Lincoln em 1047, em Aalst, Limburgo, Bélgica. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1059, em Gent, Flandres Oriental, Bélgica, com 51 anos, e foi sepultada em Gent, Flandres Oriental, Bélgica.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gisele De Luxembourg Of Luxembourg родилась около 1009 г. в местности луксембург, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Friedrich von Luxemburg Graf im Moselgau было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Irmintrud von der Wetterau, 42. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Raoul "Radulf" De Gand 1st Earl Of Lincoln в 1047 г. в местности аалст, лимбург, Бельгия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей. Она умерла в 1059 г. в местности джент, уст-влаандирен, Бельгия в возрасте 51 год и была похоронена в местности джент, уст-влаандирен, Бельгия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gisele De Luxembourg Of Luxembourg nació aproximadamente 1009, en Luxemburgo, Bélgica, su papá, Friedrich von Luxemburg Graf im Moselgau, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Irmintrud von der Wetterau, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Raoul "Radulf" De Gand 1st Earl Of Lincoln en 1047, en Aalst, Limburgo, Bélgica. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos. Murió en 1059, en Gent, Flandes Oriental, Bélgica, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultada en Gent, Flandes Oriental, Bélgica.
